NN_CORE_ALL_CSP_UNAVLBL_SW 
LABEL: 
All Core HRSNs: CSP Unavailable or Unable to Help 
DESCRIPTION: Navigation needs (NN): all navigated core health related social needs (HRSNs) community service 
provider (CSP) unavailable or unable to help. 
LONG NAME: NN_CORE_ALL_CSP_UNAVLBL_SW 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
AHC data system (derived) 
VALUES: 
0 = No 
1 = Yes
